name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry St Cloud, Florida — Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and disco...
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business functions as part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the local Miami community by providing immediate cash access through collateral-based lending and merchandise sales.

The company offers pawn loans (short-term loans secured by personal items in decent working condition), gold and diamond jewelry buying services with professional testing, retail merchandise at 25-70% discounts off retail prices, layaway options with 10% down payments, and flexible third-party payment plans (up to 12 months in some cases). They also provide an online shop with daily inventory updates, an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation, and specialty services including auto loans and firearm sales. Additional offerings include the EZ+ Rewards Program for managing pawns and earning points, jewelry protection plans with guaranteed loan amounts, and product protection plans for electronics and merchandise.

Value Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through immediate cash availability without credit checks, fair market pricing on gold/diamonds tested in-store, a diverse inventory of brand-name pre-owned items refreshed daily, and multiple payment flexibility options including layaway and third-party financing. The store maintains accessible hours seven days a week and operates as a community-focused business emphasizing respect and straightforward transactions.

This pawn shop is most suitable for individuals needing immediate cash against personal collateral, those looking to sell gold or jewelry quickly, and bargain hunters seeking significantly discounted electronics and brand merchandise. However, like all pawn loans, customers should understand that failure to repay results in loss of the pledged item, and pawn transactions involve fees beyond the principal loan amount.
pros: No credit check required—immediate cash available for pawn loans on items in decent working condition
Professional gold and diamond testing in-store to ensure fair and accurate pricing
Significant discounts on pre-owned merchandise—25-70% off retail prices with daily new inventory
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party installment plans up to 12 months
Seven-day-a-week operation (Mon-Fri 9am-7pm, Sat 9am-6pm, Sun 12pm-5pm) for accessibility
Instant Quote online tool allows customers to get item valuations in seconds before visiting
EZ+ Rewards Program with points earned on eligible pawns, sales, and purchases
Specialized services including auto loans, firearm sales, and jewelry VIP protection plans
cons: Pawn loans involve fees beyond the principal amount, and non-repayment results in loss of collateral
Pre-owned merchandise inventory means limited availability of specific items or models
Online payment options not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania, limiting geographic reach
Instant Quote tool limited to electronics; other item categories require in-store evaluation
No transparent APR or fee structure disclosed on website, requiring in-store consultation for full terms
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash without credit checks or income verification
People with gold, diamonds, or jewelry they want to sell quickly for fair market value
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking significant discounts on brand-name electronics, tools, and merchandise
Short-term borrowers with valuable collateral who prefer pawn loans over credit-based lending
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for individuals facing immediate cash needs who own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) they can pledge as collateral, or for budget shoppers seeking steep discounts on pre-owned merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loans are not credit-building products—non-repayment results in permanent loss of collateral, and all transactions include fees beyond the loan principal that should be clarified before committing.
services: Pawn loans—short-term collateral-based loans on items in decent working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with in-store precious metal testing
Retail merchandise sales—pre-owned brand-name items at 25-70% discounts
Layaway program with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party flexible payment plans—up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility
Online shop with daily inventory updates and nationwide browsing
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program with point accumulation and redemption
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise coverage
